extras: Additional resources mentioned by the community include Farm Kill achievement macro guidance and a macro file/video for players without Fast Walk.
Wiki contribution instructions were shared on July 13, 2025 and July 14, 2025 in Discord messages.

eventHistory.name: Infinite Castle
eventHistory.details: Came with the Slayer achievements and was the only way to complete them.

eventHistory.name: Halloween
eventHistory.details: Included the Halloween raid and world plus raid achievements, pets, and mobs for index progression.
